project.objective: Identify and confirm the parents of Anders Moen, born ca. 1868 in Norway, immigrated to Polk County, Minnesota

questions.question: Who were the parents of Anders Moen (b. ~1868, Norway; d. Polk County, MN)?
questions.rationale: Primary research objective; US records give the parents' given names but not their Norwegian patronymic identities.

items.rationale: Anders's Norwegian christening should name his parents directly and give their patronymic identities, confirming the given names (Hans, Marit) recovered from US records.

log.notes: 1900 US census, Polk County MN: Anders Moen, b. Oct 1868 Norway, immigrated 1888. Household names his father Hans and mother Marit (given names only; the census gives no patronymic surnames). 'Moen' is the Americanized farm-name surname the family used in the US.

sources.citation: 1900 U.S. Census, Polk County, Minnesota, population schedule, Anders Moen household; digital image, FamilySearch.org, accessed 2 May 2026.
sources.notes: Gives Anders's exact birth month/year (Oct 1868) and parents' given names (Hans, Marit); no patronymic surnames.

assertions.informant: Household member reporting to the census enumerator
assertions.informant_bias_notes: Census month/year of birth is self/household-reported; approximate.

assertions.informant: Household member reporting to the census enumerator
assertions.informant_bias_notes: Father's given name reported in the US household; no surname/patronymic given.

assertions.informant: Household member reporting to the census enumerator
assertions.informant_bias_notes: Mother's given name reported in the US household; no surname/patronymic given.

person_evidence.rationale: Father's given name 'Hans' from the 1900 census, linked to the candidate-father stub I2. Patronymic surname unknown until the Norwegian christening is found.
Mother's given name 'Marit' from the 1900 census, linked to the candidate-mother stub I3. Patronymic surname unknown until the christening is found.
